title: Mycelium Summary v1
description: Per-invocation command-output summary payload emitted by Mycelium after compressing a command's output. Producer: mycelium summarizer. Consumer: hyphae storage and cap summary surfaces.

command.description: The command whose output was summarized (e.g., 'cargo test').

summary.description: Compressed, model-ready summary of the command output.

input_tokens.description: Token count of the raw command output before compression.

output_tokens.description: Token count of the summary after compression.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when mycelium captured the command output.

project.description: Project name. Auto-detected from git root if omitted.

project_root.description: Canonical filesystem path to the repository root.

session_id.description: ULID identifying the hyphae session for attribution, if available.

exit_code.description: Exit code of the command, if captured.

exec_time_ms.description: Wall-clock execution time of the command in milliseconds.
